summary: Audience recording captures the raw, high‑energy opening with Jack Straw, delivering pure magic.
review: The lone fan review praises this audience tape for its ability to convey the Grateful Dead’s unmistakable live energy right from the gate‑opening “Jack Straw.”  While no technical details are given, the reviewer calls the recording “great” and emphasizes the raw, magical vibe of the performance.  Overall, the show is remembered as a powerful early‑Dead experience that translates well despite being an audience source.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review highlights both strong performance and enjoyable recording, but limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the tape captures raw energy well; no specific comments on clarity or mix issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic opening with Jack Straw sets a high‑octane tone for the night, described as pure magic and raw Dead energy.
